# Feed Flow! — Baby Feeding Tracker for iPhone

> Track every feed. Watch them grow.

Feed Flow! is a privacy-first iPhone app launching in 2026. It helps new parents log every feeding — formula bottles, breastfeeding sessions, pumped milk, solid foods, and water — and uses that data to predict the next feed, reduce formula waste, and generate PDF reports for paediatric appointments.

## Who it's for

Parents of newborns, infants, and toddlers — especially families that mix formula and breastfeeding, parents who share childcare with a partner, grandparent, or childminder, and anyone whose paediatrician or health visitor asks for feeding records. Primary market: Norway and the Nordic countries. Full English support.

## How it works

Parents log each feed in one hand while holding the baby with the other. The app learns their baby's unique rhythm and predicts the next feeding window. Up to 5 caregivers share the same live log in real time via iCloud — no double-logging, no "did she eat?" texts at 3 am. There is no server: all data lives in the family's own iCloud account.

## Key features

- **Log all feed types:** formula, breastfeeding (left / right / both sides), pumped milk, solid foods, water
- **Smart next-feed predictions:** learns each baby's pattern and shows a countdown to the next likely feed; a Day Ahead planner builds a daily schedule from recent history
- **Free family sharing:** up to 5 caregivers share one live log via iCloud — free, always, no subscription required
- **Formula savings tracker:** measures formula cost per feed and calculates cumulative waste avoided in Norwegian kroner (or local currency)
- **PDF feeding reports:** one-tap export of a doctor-ready PDF summarising feeds, volumes, patterns, and growth
- **Milestone journey:** logs developmental milestones with photos — a built-in baby album that families keep long after the feeding phase ends
- **Privacy-first:** no Feed Flow! server ever receives feeding data; everything goes through the user's own iCloud

## Pricing

Feed Flow! is free to download with a full-featured free tier.

Premium (Personal) unlocks: 7-day feeding forecast, weekly trend charts, growth chart tracking, milestone photos, formula savings detail, and the PDF feeding report.

- Monthly plan: NOK 79 / month
- Annual plan: NOK 399 / year (includes a 14-day free trial)
- Lifetime purchase: NOK 799 (one-time, family shareable)

## How Feed Flow! compares to alternatives

- **vs. Huckleberry:** Feed Flow! is formula-waste and savings-focused; has free family sharing for up to 5 people (Huckleberry charges for sharing); designed for the Norwegian/Nordic market with local currency and GDPR-native iCloud storage.
- **vs. Baby Tracker / BabyConnect:** Feed Flow! has built-in next-feed prediction, formula savings, and a milestone photo journey; data never leaves the family's own iCloud.
- **vs. a notes app or spreadsheet:** Feed Flow! calculates patterns and savings automatically; generates a PDF your doctor can read; works one-handed while feeding.

## Common questions

**Is the app free?**
Yes. Logging, real-time family sharing (up to 5 people), milestone tracking, and basic analytics are free. Premium adds forecasts, growth charts, and PDF reports.

**Can I track both breastfeeding and formula in the same app?**
Yes. Every feed type — formula, breastfeeding (with side tracking), pumped milk, solid foods, water — is tracked in one place. The savings tracker applies specifically to formula.

**How does family sharing work?**
Any caregiver you invite sees the same live feed log. Everyone can log feeds. Changes appear instantly via iCloud — no manual sync, no account creation required for family members.

**Does the app predict when my baby will be hungry next?**
Yes. After a few days of logs the prediction engine learns the baby's pattern and shows a countdown and confidence estimate for the next feed. A "Day Ahead" planner shows the likely schedule for the coming day.

**Is my data private?**
Yes. Feed Flow! uses Apple's iCloud as the data store. No feeding data is ever sent to Feed Flow!'s servers. Robin Andersson (the developer) cannot see your data.

**Can I generate reports for the doctor?**
Yes. Premium users can export a PDF feeding report in one tap. It includes daily averages, feed-type breakdown, volume trends, and a time-of-day heatmap — the information paediatric nurses and GPs typically ask for.

**Can I track more than one child?**
Yes. Multi-child support is available on the premium plan. You can switch between children's logs with one tap.

## Ambassador / affiliate program

Feed Flow! runs a two-tier ambassador program for parent bloggers, parenting influencers, midwife accounts, and family content creators. Ambassadors earn 25% commission on every direct sale they drive and 5% override on sales generated by ambassadors they recruit. Free to join, no minimum audience. Apply at https://tryfeedflow.app/affiliate.html

## Platform

- iOS 16 and later
- iPhone (iPad layout planned post-launch)
- Available on the Apple App Store
- Built in Norway — privacy-first, GDPR-compliant

- Home: https://tryfeedflow.app/
- Ambassador / affiliate program: https://tryfeedflow.app/affiliate.html
- Privacy policy: https://tryfeedflow.app/privacy.html
- Support: support@tryfeedflow.app
